title: Rename Cabinet repository to heimgewebe-katalog
goal: Rename the app-independent repository and migrate ecosystem references only after the external Cabinet runtime has been retired and all active consumers are known.

acceptance.assertion: GitHub repository and local checkout use heimgewebe-katalog, with the old name retained only as a documented temporary redirect or compatibility path.
Bureau, Grabowski, RepoBrief/Lenskit, Leitstand, Schauwerk and prominent documentation references use the new repository identity.
README, AGENTS, generated catalog and dump entrypoints resolve after the rename.
No active service, queue or status model continues under the old Cabinet identity.

metadata.source_decision: Cabinet is to become an app-independent Heimgewebe system catalog.

scope: rename GitHub repository heimgewebe/cabinet to heimgewebe/heimgewebe-katalog
migrate active repository, runtime, Bureau, RepoBrief/Lenskit, Leitstand and Schauwerk references
remove active cabinet.service compatibility alias and active cabinet-named publish/export aliases
retain immutable historical evidence and platform-managed GitHub redirects only
conditions: T013 remains verified and system catalog runtime is active before migration
all repository mutations use isolated worktrees and current origin/main
runtime unit is rebound to the new local path before final verification
no private archive, backup snapshot or retention policy is deleted or changed
T014 closes only after new GitHub identity, local path, runtime and active consumers are verified
does_not_authorize: deletion of historical receipts or PR evidence
deletion of private Cabinet archives or backup snapshots
